display.purpose: Storey and page titles. Inter 900, tight line-height.

label.purpose: Kickers, HUD captions, footers. Always JetBrains Mono, uppercase, tracked.

numeral.purpose: Every stat and quantity. Mono 800 with cyan text-glow (the Mono Numerals Rule).

shadows.name: panel
shadows.purpose: Default grounding shadow for cards and panels against the sky.

shadows.name: aurora-sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle interactive glow: hover and focus accents.

shadows.name: aurora-md
shadows.purpose: Earned/achievement glow: rewards, completions, perfect scores.

shadows.name: numeral-glow
shadows.purpose: Text-glow finishing every mono stat numeral.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and state transitions (fade-in-up).

motion.name: ease-spring-pop
motion.purpose: Achievement pops and world physics only (badge pop, falling tower pieces).

motion.name: breathe
motion.purpose: Ambient life on the logo badge and live elements; must have reduced-motion fallback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action: ocean-to-deep blue gradient that glows cyan on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: calc(0.75rem - 2px); background: linear-gradient(to right, #00B4D8, #0077B6); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,119,182,0.3); transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 36px rgba(0,245,212,0.35); opacity: 0.95; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a1015, 0 0 0 4px #00F5D4; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action on any dark surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #253141; border-radius: calc(0.75rem - 2px); background: rgba(10,16,21,0.3); color: #ebf6fa; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #1a2637; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a1015, 0 0 0 4px #00F5D4; }

components.name: Game Panel
components.description: Signature HUD slab: neon light-bar, scanlines, corner brackets, glass blur.
components.html:
Storey IV — Branching

3 of 5 quests cleared
components.css: .ds-game-panel { position: relative; overflow: hidden; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(0,245,212,0.16); border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(8,25,45,0.82), rgba(3,12,24,0.94)), rgba(2,8,18,0.92); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(125,211,252,0.08), 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.34); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); color: #ebf6fa; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 0.22s ease, border-color 0.22s ease; } .ds-game-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0,245,212,0.62), rgba(0,180,216,0.45), transparent); opacity: 0.75; } .ds-game-panel::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,245,212,0.025) 0, rgba(0,245,212,0.025) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 5px); opacity: 0.32; mask-image: linear-gradient(180deg, #000, transparent 70%); } .ds-game-panel:hover { border-color: rgba(0,245,212,0.28); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(125,211,252,0.12), 0 0 22px rgba(0,245,212,0.08), 0 16px 42px rgba(0,0,0,0.42); } .ds-game-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 0.4rem; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-game-panel p { margin: 0; color: #7594a3; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-corner { position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-color: rgba(190,235,255,0.72); pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; } .ds-corner-tl { top: 8px; left: 8px; border-top: 1.5px solid; border-left: 1.5px solid; border-top-left-radius: 4px; } .ds-corner-tr { top: 8px; right: 8px; border-top: 1.5px solid; border-right: 1.5px solid; border-top-right-radius: 4px; } .ds-corner-bl { bottom: 8px; left: 8px; border-bottom: 1.5px solid; border-left: 1.5px solid; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; } .ds-corner-br { bottom: 8px; right: 8px; border-bottom: 1.5px solid; border-right: 1.5px solid; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Stat Tile
components.description: Compact KPI instrument with accent top edge and mono numeral.
components.css: .ds-stat-tile { --tile-accent: rgba(0,245,212,0.7); position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; min-width: 11rem; padding: 1.1rem 1.2rem 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(10,28,50,0.9), rgba(4,13,28,0.92)); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-stat-tile::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 3px; background: var(--tile-accent); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--tile-accent); } .ds-stat-tile:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); border-color: rgba(0,245,212,0.45); } .ds-stat-label { color: #7594a3; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.64rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-stat-value { color: #00F5D4; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(0,245,212,0.34); }

components.name: Index Pill
components.description: Cyan navigation/index chip used in the tower rail and headers.
components.css: .ds-index-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; min-height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.65rem; border: 1px solid rgba(0,245,212,0.28); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(0,245,212,0.1); color: #00F5D4; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(0,245,212,0.12); }

components.name: Icon Chip
components.description: Glowing icon well used inside panels and tiles.
components.css: .ds-game-chip { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 2.4rem; height: 2.4rem; border: 1px solid rgba(0,245,212,0.26); border-radius: 8px; background: radial-gradient(circle at 32% 26%, rgba(0,245,212,0.18), rgba(0,180,216,0.05) 70%), rgba(4,16,32,0.7); box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px rgba(0,245,212,0.10), 0 0 14px rgba(0,245,212,0.08); color: #00F5D4; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field: stone stroke at rest, cyan ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; max-width: 22rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 0.85rem; border: 1px solid #253141; border-radius: calc(0.75rem - 2px); background: rgba(10,16,21,0.5); color: #ebf6fa; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7594a3; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(0,245,212,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a1015, 0 0 0 4px #00F5D4; }

narrative.overview: A wizard's tower at night. The learner studies under a living sky — sun and moon arcing, stars fading, clouds drifting in parallax — while glowing instruments report the state of their work. Every surface is deep night-navy stone; every signal is light: aurora-cyan edges, warm window glow, neon numerals. The system runs at two intensities: atmospheric surfaces (home hub, tower, quest selection) carry the world, while the practice workspace inverts the ratio — a faint atmospheric wash behind a ruthlessly legible terminal and DAG.
keyCharacteristics: Deep night-navy darkness as the canvas; light as the only signal vocabulary
Instrumented and precise components: mono numerals, corner brackets, 1px neon edges, scanlines
A living, time-aware sky as ambient identity on world surfaces
Motion with physical weight — pieces fall, settle, and breathe; glow pulses mark life
Warm amber (window light) as the single warm counterpoint to the cyan/blue field

rules.name: The Light-Is-Signal Rule
rules.body: Cyan and blue are never decoration-by-default. A glow means one of three things: it is interactive, it is alive (in progress), or it was earned. If none apply, the element stays stone.

rules.name: The One Warm Note Rule
rules.body: Amber belongs to the world (windows, doors, chests). It is prohibited in UI chrome, buttons, and text.

rules.name: The Mono Numerals Rule
rules.body: Every quantity — coins, scores, percentages, counts — renders in JetBrains Mono with a neon text-shadow. Inter never carries a stat.

rules.name: The Earned Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow intensity scales with meaning: rest < hover < alive < earned. The brightest pulses are reserved for achievement moments and are never ambient.

dos: Do express depth as light: panel shadow to ground, cyan glow to elevate, exactly per the Earned Glow Rule.
Do set every numeral in JetBrains Mono 800 with a cyan text-glow (the Mono Numerals Rule).
Do give every infinite animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback — the codebase pattern is animation: none; opacity: 1.
Do use spring-flavored easing only for achievement pops and world physics; state transitions use cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) ease-out.
Do keep body prose in Starlight (#ebf6fa) at 0.875rem/1.55 — Mist (#7594a3) is for labels and supporting lines only.
donts: Don't build flat card grids or generic SaaS dashboards — identical icon+heading+text tiles repeated in a grid are the named anti-reference. Use readout rails, metric lines, and instruments instead.
Don't write wordy explainer UI: no tooltip essays, no paragraph-length helper text. Show state, don't narrate it.
Don't drift into cutesy edu-gamification (Duolingo-style): no mascot cheer, no confetti-for-everything. Celebration scales with achievement.
Don't scatter random decoration. Particles, glows, and sparks exist only inside composed set-pieces; a stray glow with no meaning violates the Light-Is-Signal Rule.
Don't use amber in UI chrome — it belongs to the world's windows, doors, and chests (the One Warm Note Rule).
Don't use pure white text or untinted grays; every neutral carries the cold blue cast of the palette.
